response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two vocal songs: 'Pink Rose' (00:00-02:16) and 'チェイス!チェイス!チェイス!' (02:22-04:56). 2. For 'Pink Rose', confirmed metadata: performed by Shiranui Flare and Shirogane Noel, original song by Kiyommy+Seiya. Used search tool to find the lyrics. 3. For 'チェイス!チェイス!チェイス!', identified performers as Shiranui Flare and Houshou Marine from video. Lyrics were visible on-screen, transcribed and verified. 4. Created JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance by Shiranui Flare during her birthday festival, featuring two songs: 'Pink Rose' with Shirogane Noel, and 'Chase! Chase! Chase!' with Houshou Marine.

scenes.description: The song 'Pink Rose' is performed by Shiranui Flare and Shirogane Noel.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もしも君が攫われて
捕らえられたとしたら
必ず立ち向かうよ
君を救う為に
茨の森なんてさ
なんてことないだろう
君が苦しむのだけは
耐えられないから
好きだよ。
薔薇の様に美しい
君に捧げる愛の詩
強くなんてなれなくても
ただ君の側にいたい。
もしも君が争いに
巻き込まれたとしたら
僕はその中へ飛び込み
君を逃したい
切ないほど好き。
薔薇の様に美しい
君が奏でる愛のうた
運命がどうなろうとも
ただ君を守りたい
花よりも鳥よりも
美しく可憐な君
幸せでいられるように
ただ君を守りたい
君のすべてを守るよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Supposing that you were snatched away, that you were seized; if that happened, I'd fight without fail in order to save you. Forests of briars are nothing to me, because the only thing I can't bear is your suffering. I love you. I dedicate these verses of love to you, as beautiful as a rose. Even if I can't be strong, I merely want to stay by your side. Supposing that you were dragged into strife; if that happened, I'd want to burst in and set you free. I love you so much it's painful. You sing with the timbre of love, as beautiful as a rose. Whatever our fate shall be, I merely want to protect you. More beautifully sweet than flowers or birds, I merely want to protect you so that you can remain happy. I shall protect every last part of you.

scenes.description: A short transition period between the two songs showing the concert venue and audience.
The song 'Chase! Chase! Chase!' is performed by Shiranui Flare and Houshou Marine.
scenes.song_title: チェイス!チェイス!チェイス!
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
チェイス!チェイス!チェイス!
あと3センチ
キミのくちびるまで
妄想つむぐ
イカした夢はなぜか
これからってトコで
いつもさめる
わずかに10センチ
のばす腕むなしく
シャッター閉まる扉
ホームにひとり
キミとガラスごしに
目と目が合う
ああ ここはひとつ
笑うしかない
白線のうしろ
立ち上がんだ
不覚にも涙がこぼれても
チェイス ここはひとつ
笑うしかない
いつかキミまで
追いつくかな
...
帰って捨てちゃうほど
かわりはいるぞなんて
ううん どうなの?
おじいちゃんおばあちゃん
すぐに投げちゃいけないんだよね
今も昔もこれからもずっと
かわりに僕はどこにもいない
もう ここはひとつ
笑うしかない
わかりあえる
その日が来るまで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Chase! Chase! Chase!
Just 3 centimeters
Until your lips
Spinning delusions
Why are my cool dreams
Always waking up
Right at the beginning?
Just 10 centimeters
Extending my arm in vain
Shutter closing, the door closes
Alone on the platform
Through the glass with you
Our eyes meet
Ah, for now
I can only laugh
Standing up
Behind the white line
Even if tears fall unexpectedly
Chase, for now
I can only laugh
I wonder if I'll ever
Catch up to you?
...
Enough to go home and throw it away
Saying 'there's a replacement for you'
No, what is that?
Grandpa, Grandma
We shouldn't throw it away quickly, right?
Now, in the past, and forever
There's no replacement for me anywhere
Already, for now
I can only laugh
Until the day we can
Understand each other.
